scope: Remaining real LLM/SSE agent atom outside create_task: non-create_task execute paths, SSE/client event handling, reject filtering, and degraded provider fail-closed behavior.
secretsPolicy: No provider secrets were read, printed, or written. This evidence uses deterministic route/client tests only.

testHarnessFix.rootCause: The harness session expired on 2026-07-01, so current-date runs authenticated as 401 before reaching agent execute behavior.
testHarnessFix.change: Moved the fake session expiry to 2099-01-01 and renamed a misleading version-lock test that was previously labeled as permission-denied coverage. No production code changed.

verifiedAtoms.evidence: agent /execute redispatches comment_task to the governed comments route and does not return tool_not_executable_yet. In this harness the governed route returns persistence_not_configured/task_not_found/permission_missing rather than a fake agent success.

agent /execute applies a previewed planning scenario through the governed scenario apply route, bumps planVersion from 5 to 6, records planning.scenario.applied, and records agent.apply_resource_resolution.applied provenance.
stale clientPlanVersion through agent /execute returns 422 plan_version_conflict and applies no planning commands.

web tests cover reasoning/analyze/proposal/done SSE parsing, CRLF/chunking/error/incomplete-stream behavior, and reject-one/apply-one UI filtering where only the selected change_task_status action is sent to execute.
absent provider configuration reports mock-llm live=false configured=false and both /propose and /propose/stream return 503 agent_provider_not_configured.

commands.resultBeforeFix: failed; apps/api/src/agent/agentExecute.test.ts 3 failed because the test session was expired and requests returned 401/undefined results

remainingGaps: This evidence does not run live OpenRouter/Anthropic network calls or browser UI traversal; those remain covered only by previous live evidence when provider credentials were available.
True permission-denied apply for scenario-apply was not added here; the checked rejection variant is governed plan_version_conflict.
